untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific candle pattern type (unspecified), confirmation via opening gap method (requires gap detection logic not in standard indicator set), and market-direction-dependent logic with next-day candle color analysis. Source text is incomplete (cuts off mid-sentence). Cannot reliably translate pattern recognition and next-day confirmation rules without explicit pattern definition and gap indicator.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core logic: (1) breakout from pattern using Donchian channels as proxy for candle pattern boundaries, (2) position relative to 50-day moving average. Entry uses breakout above/below Donchian with MA confirmation. Exit uses reversal toward Donchian middle. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect bull/bear market dependency. Parameters with AUTHOR_SILENT values (success rates, performance metrics, volume trend) cannot be translated to rule conditions.
